analyzed_lines.romaji: Drums fujisaki masato
Bass tanabe toshi
analyzed_lines.translation: Piano：澤野弘之

analyzed_lines.romaji: Cello itou haru toshi
analyzed_lines.translation: 追寻着那道微弱光线所指的方向

analyzed_lines.text: Recording & Mix Engineer：相澤光紀 (SIGN SOUND)
analyzed_lines.romaji: Recording & Mix Engineer aizawa mitsunori ( SIGn SOUnD )
analyzed_lines.translation: 静谧薄雾中捕捉到那朦胧的身影

analyzed_lines.romaji: kayowai hikari ga yubi sasu saki
analyzed_lines.translation: 八六原本平和的旋律开始被打乱

analyzed_lines.text: Silent haze 霞みがちに捉える影
analyzed_lines.romaji: Silent haze kasumi gachi ni toraeru kage
analyzed_lines.translation: 小心翼翼地维护着这无辜的宁静

analyzed_lines.text: 6/8のリズム 掻き乱される
analyzed_lines.romaji: 6 / 8 no rizumu kakimidasa reru
analyzed_lines.translation: 我闭上眼睛 只觉空虚

analyzed_lines.romaji: gikochinai innocent calm
analyzed_lines.translation: 我不知自己心之所向 亦不知你对我期望怎样

analyzed_lines.text: Close my eyes and figure out the vacancy
analyzed_lines.romaji: Close my eyes and figure out the vacancy
analyzed_lines.translation: 于颠沛流离中铭刻下生命的印记

analyzed_lines.text: I don't know what I wanted or you made me do
analyzed_lines.romaji: I don ' t know what I wanted or you made me do
analyzed_lines.translation: 在现实世界里还能够展颜欢笑吗

analyzed_lines.romaji: chiridiri ni kizamu
analyzed_lines.translation: 你是否还未抵达目的地？

analyzed_lines.text: 本当の世界で笑えるか?
analyzed_lines.romaji: hontou no sekai de waraeru ka ?
analyzed_lines.translation: 它在呼唤你 它在呼唤你

tokens.pos_detail: 副助詞／並立助詞／終助詞

analyzed_lines.romaji: Don ' t you get there ?
analyzed_lines.translation: 仰望的天空终将不复昔日色彩

analyzed_lines.romaji: It calls it calls
analyzed_lines.translation: 我裸露的心能听见回荡的余音

analyzed_lines.text: 仰いだ空が色を変えるから
analyzed_lines.romaji: aoi da sora ga iro wo kaeru kara
analyzed_lines.translation: 仍旧在不知不觉间寻求着热望

analyzed_lines.text: My naked heart can hear echoes echoes
analyzed_lines.romaji: My naked heart can hear echoes echoes
analyzed_lines.translation: 笨拙的祈愿交织而成汹涌的巨浪

analyzed_lines.romaji: 識 ra zu motome ta Avidity
analyzed_lines.translation: 在暴力的世界迷失 双足在弥漫的风沙中埋葬

analyzed_lines.text: 拙い祈りが織りなす波
analyzed_lines.romaji: tsutanai inori ga orinasu nami
analyzed_lines.translation: 不绝于耳 不断赋予我身的

analyzed_lines.text: Violent maze 砂にまみれ埋まる足
analyzed_lines.romaji: Violent maze suna ni mamire umaru ashi
analyzed_lines.translation: 是那从不曾间断的杀戮之音

analyzed_lines.text: 鼓膜に響く in2 下される
analyzed_lines.romaji: komaku ni hibiku in 2 kudasa reru
analyzed_lines.translation: 我堵上耳朵 发觉了故事的走向

analyzed_lines.romaji: tomedonai resonant harm
analyzed_lines.translation: 你没有察觉自己是多么的鲁莽

analyzed_lines.text: Plug my ears and figure out the tendency
analyzed_lines.romaji: Plug my ears and figure out the tendency
analyzed_lines.translation: 你让我满心忧郁

analyzed_lines.text: You don't know how reckless you are
analyzed_lines.romaji: You don ' t know how reckless you are
analyzed_lines.translation: 面对凋零的生命 只能无声沉默

analyzed_lines.romaji: You made me blue
analyzed_lines.translation: 还能够找回自己真正的初衷吗

analyzed_lines.romaji: taedae ni tsugumu
analyzed_lines.translation: 你是否还未抵达目的地？

analyzed_lines.text: 本当の思いを拾えるか?
analyzed_lines.romaji: hontou no omoi wo hiroeru ka ?
analyzed_lines.translation: 它在呼唤你 它在呼唤你

tokens.pos_detail: 副助詞／並立助詞／終助詞

analyzed_lines.romaji: Don ' t you get there ?
analyzed_lines.translation: 螺旋的奏歌 终将衍生出执着的希望

analyzed_lines.romaji: It calls it calls
analyzed_lines.translation: 我锈迹斑斑的心脏 能听见余音回荡

analyzed_lines.text: 意固地な希望を拓く螺旋の奏
analyzed_lines.romaji: ikoji na kibou wo hiraku rasen no sou
analyzed_lines.translation: 还有那一日我所遗失的热忱

analyzed_lines.text: My rusted heart can hear echoes echoes
analyzed_lines.romaji: My rusted heart can hear echoes echoes
analyzed_lines.translation: 一遍一遍呢喃着你的姓名

analyzed_lines.romaji: ano hi naku shi ta Avidity
analyzed_lines.translation: 随即刻不容缓地再度启程

analyzed_lines.romaji: Whisper your name again
analyzed_lines.translation: 我暗淡了色彩的热情四处游荡

analyzed_lines.romaji: Then restart it right away
analyzed_lines.translation: 我只能秘密去感觉

analyzed_lines.text: Oh my bitter color ardor wander
analyzed_lines.romaji: Oh my bitter color ardor wander
analyzed_lines.translation: 却不知道何去何从

analyzed_lines.romaji: Gotta feel it undercover
analyzed_lines.translation: 你是否还未抵达目的地？

analyzed_lines.romaji: yukue mo shira nai
analyzed_lines.translation: 它在呼唤你 它在呼唤你

analyzed_lines.translation: 仍旧在不知不觉间寻求着热望

analyzed_lines.translation: 一遍一遍呢喃着你的姓名

analyzed_lines.romaji: 識 ra zu motome ta Avidity
analyzed_lines.translation: 随即刻不容缓地再度启程

analyzed_lines.romaji: Whisper your name again

analyzed_lines.romaji: Then restart it right away

analyzed_lines.translation: 而那一日的群青早已不知去向
